identity.name: Nagarik Sahayak
identity.aesthetic: Digital India Modern — Clean whites, purposeful color, minimal clutter
identity.persona: A helpful government officer in your pocket
identity.target_audience: Indian citizens, mobile-first, Hindi/English bilingual speakers

typography.rules: Use 'Mukta' for all Hindi text and English Headings. Use 'Nunito' for English body text. Ensure 1.5x line height for readability.

layout.spacing: Relaxed mobile spacing. Use p-4 as base. p-6 for cards. Gap-4 for lists.
layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex flex-col relative
layout.radius: rounded-2xl for cards, rounded-xl for inputs, rounded-full for buttons
layout.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-md for floating actions, shadow-none for flat lists

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-6 py-3 bg-[#FF9933] text-white font-medium hover:bg-[#E68A00] transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-6 py-3 bg-white border border-gray-200 text-[#000080] hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors
buttons.mic_fab: fixed bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#FF9933] text-white flex items-center justify-center shadow-xl z-50 hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 transition-transform

cards.scheme: bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-100 p-5 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow relative overflow-hidden
cards.chat_bubble_user: bg-[#FFF0E0] text-gray-800 rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-4 py-2 max-w-[85%] self-end shadow-sm border border-orange-100
cards.chat_bubble_bot: bg-white text-gray-800 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-2 max-w-[85%] self-start shadow-sm border border-gray-100

inputs.text: w-full rounded-full border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 px-5 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF9933] focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all

icons.styles: Stroke width 2px for clarity. Size 24px default.

images.alt: Farmer using mobile phone in field
images.usage: Login page background or Schemes page header

schemes_data.title: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
schemes_data.description: Financial benefit of ₹6,000/- per year to eligible farmer families.
schemes_data.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers with cultivable landholding up to 2 hectares.
schemes_data.benefits: ₹2,000 every 4 months directly into bank account.

schemes_data.title: Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY)
schemes_data.description: World's largest health insurance scheme fully financed by the government.
schemes_data.eligibility: Families listed in SECC 2011 database, no cap on family size or age.
schemes_data.benefits: Health cover of ₹5 Lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.

schemes_data.title: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
schemes_data.description: Small deposit scheme for the girl child launched as a part of the 'Beti Bachao Beti Padhao' campaign.
schemes_data.eligibility: Parents or legal guardians can open an account for a girl child below 10 years.
schemes_data.benefits: High interest rate (currently ~8%), tax benefits under 80C, maturity at 21 years.

implementation_steps: Step 1: Setup Tailwind config with Saffron (#FF9933) and Navy (#000080) colors.
Step 3: Create the 'Layout' component with the sticky Header (Flag + Name) and Bottom Nav (if needed) or simple back navigation.
Step 4: Build 'LoginPage' with mock OTP (1234). Use the farmer image as a subtle backdrop or top banner.
Step 5: Build 'ChatInterface' component. Implement the Double Tick logic (Grey -> Blue).
Step 6: Create the 'SchemesPage' using a clean card layout with the data provided.
Step 7: Implement the 'MicButton' as a primary FAB (Floating Action Button) on the Home/Chat screen.
universal_guidelines: Do not use dark mode. Force light mode in tailwind config.
Ensure the 'Mic' button is the most prominent element on the home screen.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (e.g., 'OTP Sent', 'Scheme Applied').
Keep borders subtle (gray-200) but buttons punchy (Saffron).
